name: Brave Search API
overview: The Brave Search API provides access to a completely independent, global web index that does not rely on Big Tech monopolies, ensuring unbiased and private results.
details: The vast majority of alternative search engines simply lease their search results from Google or Bing. Brave has built its own independent index of the web from scratch. It is designed to prioritize high-quality, human-created content while aggressively filtering out SEO spam and affiliate marketing farms.

For OpenClaw, the Brave API offers a massive, high-quality data stream that is free from algorithmic bias or corporate filtering. It provides a clean, well-structured JSON response that agents can parse instantly without needing secondary extraction tools.

Because it emphasizes privacy and data independence, it aligns perfectly with the MetaClaw ethos. It is highly recommended for users who want enterprise-grade search speed but refuse to feed their AI's queries into the data-harvesting ecosystems of major tech conglomerates.
